assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Explicitly shows control plane upgrade as Step 1 before any node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Clear upgrade sequence: Coordinators → Data → Masters with detailed rationale (risk-ascending order, coordinators lowest risk, masters highest risk)

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: States 'Regional PVs (survive node replacement)' and 'PVs will reattach to new nodes automatically' and 'regional PVs ensure your data survives node replacement seamlessly'

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Provides specific PDB configuration with minAvailable: 2 for masters with comment 'Allow 1 master to drain, keep quorum of 2'

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Shows explicit commands setting max-surge-upgrade 1 and max-unavailable-upgrade 0 for all three node pools

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Shows health checks between each upgrade step and includes commands to verify green status and cluster health

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: No mention of checking or setting PV reclaim policy to Retain as a safety measure

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Includes 'kubectl get statefulsets -n elasticsearch' in post-upgrade validation section

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Provides detailed Elasticsearch snapshot creation commands in the pre-upgrade checklist section
